Products.premiumHaircareSubtitle: We use the best haircare products selected by experts to enhance your beauty and keep your hair healthy.
Products.rcoDescription: Luxury haircare designed by top hairstylists. Color-safe, heat & UV protective, and vegan.
Products.k18Title: K18 - The Future of Hair Repair
Products.k18Description: Biotech-powered formula that restores hair strength and elasticity in just 4 minutes.
Products.colorWowTitle: Color Wow - The Science of Stunning Hair
Products.colorWowDescription: Advanced, science-backed formulas for high-performance color care without harmful ingredients.
Products.roze+quartzTitle: Roze + Quartz - Advanced Clean Bond-Repair Haircare
Products.roze+quartzDescription: Experience a pure, clean formula free of sulfates, parabens, and harmful chemicals. Powered by advanced bond-repair technology, it visibly strengthens and restores your hair.

Location.title: iFierce Beauty Lounge
Location.subtitle: Come visit us and discover how the right care can help you feel even more confident and radiant.
Location.address:
2685 E. Oakland Park Blvd
Fort Lauderdale, FL 33306

About.paragraph1: Hello! I'm Flavia, specializing in hair coloring—especially blondes, balayage, and ombré. Since 2006, I've been deeply involved in the beauty industry, and since 2017, I've been working at iFierce Beauty Lounge.
About.paragraph2: My passion for hair transformation started early when I used to color my mom’s hair. That led me to invest in courses, training, and hands-on experience at various salons until I finally earned my own chair. Today, I see every client as an opportunity to enhance the confidence they already carry within.
About.paragraph3: My specialty is creating modern and healthy looks while preserving hair integrity. I also love getting to know each client and building long-lasting relationships. For me, hair is not just color—it’s expression, connection, and genuine care.
About.paragraph4: Every day, I learn from my team and the unique challenges that come through the salon doors. If you're looking to lighten your hair or completely transform your look, I'm here to help.
About.motto: Motto: “Too much ego will kill your talent.”

Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: Elevate your beauty experience with our premium hair care services. From deep conditioning treatments to luxurious blowouts, we provide the best for you.

Promotions.sectionSubtitle: Discover our special offers and elevate your style!
Promotions.referralTitle: The Best Compliment I Could Receive? A Referral from You! 😊
Promotions.referralTerms: New clients only. Cannot be combined with any other offer, promotion, gift card, new client special, or $150 gift certificate. Referral credit applied after the referred guest's first completed service.
Promotions.welcomeDescription: Are you ready for a fabulous hair transformation? We’ve created a delightful experience just for you!
Promotions.welcomeItem1: Base Color – Refresh or enhance your hair color
Promotions.welcomeItem2: Glossing or Conditioning Treatment – For shine and hydration, giving your hair a healthy glow
Promotions.welcomeItem3: Precision Haircut & Blowout – A flawless finish to complete your look
Promotions.welcomeValidDays: Valid on Tuesdays and Wednesdays only.
Promotions.referralHow: Simply mention the name of the client who referred you when booking.
Promotions.referralThanks: Thank you for supporting my small business and trusting me with your hair. 💛
